Contractor.relationship_description: The terms of the Addendum govern the actions and obligations of the Contractor in relation to National Grid, ensuring that the intents and purposes of the agreements are fulfilled.

National Grid.relationship_description: The National Grid is involved in the execution of the Non-Disclosure Agreement, indicating that it has a legal obligation to adhere to the terms outlined in the agreement regarding confidentiality and information sharing.

Party to Agreement.relationship_description: The Contractor and National Grid are both parties to the Non-Disclosure Agreement, indicating a formal relationship where both entities are bound by the terms of the agreement.

Corporation.relationship_description: Both Corporation and Limited Liability Company are forms of business entities that provide limited liability to their owners, making them clearly related in the context of business structures.

Limited Liability Company.entity_description: A limited liability company (LLC) is a flexible form of enterprise that blends elements of partnership and corporate structures. Owners of an LLC have limited personal liability for the debts and actions of the LLC, and it can be taxed as a sole proprietorship, partnership, or corporation.

Limited Liability Partnership.entity_description: A limited liability partnership (LLP) is a partnership in which some or all partners have limited liabilities. It is a hybrid between a traditional partnership and a corporation, allowing for the benefits of limited liability while maintaining the tax benefits of a partnership.

Type of Business Entity.relationship_description: Both Corporation and Limited Liability Company are forms of business entities that provide limited liability to their owners, making them clearly related in the context of business structures.

Parties.entity_description: The Parties refer to the individuals or entities involved in a legal agreement or contract, who must agree upon terms and conditions before proceeding with any actions related to the agreement.

Affiliates.entity_description: Affiliates refer to companies or entities that are associated with or connected to National Grid, sharing interests or operations. They are also protected under the agreements made with the Contractor.
